notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

newTicket.subject: 🎟️ Ticket for {eventName} ({name})
newTicket.heading: {name}, your Ticket is Ready!
newTicket.intro: Hi {name}, your secure ticket for {eventName} was generated. Please save this email and present the attached ticket at the entrance of the event.
newTicket.useOptions: You may use the attached ticket file, the <profile>ticket in your profile</profile> or your <wallet>Apple Wallet Ticket</wallet> <ios>(iOS only)</ios> to enter the event.
newTicket.infoValidOne: This ticket is valid for one person
newTicket.infoNonRefundable: Ticket is non-refundable, but you can transfer it to someone else
newTicket.infoCodeOfConduct: <link>Code of conduct</link> applies at all our events
newTicket.infoVenueTerms: Event entry is subject to venue's terms and conditions
newTicket.infoShowQr: Show this QR code at the entrance
